# Mechs


## Categories

- [Common Core Mechs](common/index.md) — 12 designs
- [Confederate Vanguard Union Mechs](union/index.md) — 18 designs
- [Helios Sovereignty Mechs](helios/index.md) — 18 designs
- [Omnisphere Imperium Mechs](imperium/index.md) — 18 designs
- [Orion Corporate Mechs](orion/index.md) — 18 designs
- [Starcrest Protectorate Mechs](starcrest/index.md) — 18 designs

## Reading the Technical Readouts

- **Mass, armor, speed, jump capability, heat sinks, shields, and loadouts** are drawn from the QKS data when available.
- **Battlefield roles** are editorial classifications inferred from mass, mobility, armor, jump capability, shields, and weapon loadout.
- Common mechs are listed separately and are not duplicated under each faction.
